settings.title: Settings
settings.profilePlaceholder: Profile settings will be available soon.

transport.alertsDesc: Configure how many days before expiry an alert is shown for documents and vehicle certificates.
transport.alertDaysHint: Alerts will appear this many days before ITP, RCA, vignette and document expiry dates.
transport.plateDesc: Customize the regex pattern used to validate license plates.
transport.unitsDesc: Choose the distance unit and currency used across the transport module.
transport.currencyHint: Used for fuel costs, revenues and reports.
transport.tableDesc: Default number of rows shown per page in all transport tables.
transport.defaultPageSizeHint: Applied as default when opening any transport table.
